name: Doc HoneyBerry Kitty Surgery
author: Poki
description: Doc HoneyBerry Kitty Surgery is a game where you help Doc HoneyBerry out with taking care of a little kitty who got into a nasty accident. Wash, clean, dry, mend bones and dress the kitty up to get it back to its happy cheerful self! Are you ready to rescue the kitty? How to play Doc HoneyBerry Kitty Surgery? Click, tap or drag on the screen to interact. Who created Doc HoneyBerry Kitty Surgery? Doc HoneyBerry Kitty Surgery is created by Go Panda Games.
